zh.Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾貝福 霍爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Boteler II於大約1309年出生在英國藍卡爾沃林頓時，他的父親William Boteler I35歲，母親Sybil31歲。他與Elizabeth在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1369年8月14日在他的家鄉享年61歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾沃林頓。

zh-hans.Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾貝福 霍爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Boteler II于大约1309年出生在英国藍卡爾沃林頓时，他的父亲William Boteler I35岁，母亲Sybil31岁。他与Elizabeth在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1369年8月14日在他的家乡享年61岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾沃林頓。

nameMeanings.name: Boteler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a maker of leather bottles, from an agent derivative of Middle English botel, Old French bouteille ‘bottle’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When William Boteler II was born about 1309, in Warrington, Lancashire, England, his father, William Boteler I, was 35 and his mother, Sybil, was 31. He married Elizabeth in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 14 August 1369, in his hometown, at the age of 61, and was buried in Warrington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Boteler II est né environ 1309, à Warrington, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, William Boteler I, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Sybil, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 14 août 1369, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Warrington, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Boteler II um 1309 in Warrington, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Boteler I 35 und seine Mutter Sybil 31. Er hat in England, United Kingdom Elizabeth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 14. August 1369 im Alter von 61 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Warrington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Boteler II è nato il circa 1309 nel Warrington, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, William Boteler I, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Sybil, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 14 agosto 1369, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Warrington, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイアベウセイ ハル
ja.lifeSummary: William Boteler IIが約1309年にイギリスランカシュアイアワーリントンで生まれた時，父William Boteler Iは35歳，母Sybilは31歳であった。イギリスイギリスでElizabethと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1369年8月14日に故郷で61歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアワーリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Boteler II(이)가 대략 1309년 영국 랭카실르 워링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Boteler I(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Sybil(은)는 31세였다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드에서 Elizabeth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1369년 8월 14일 그의 고향에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 워링턴에 묻혔다.

mn.St Elphin's Churchyard, Warrington, Ches: Warrington, Legeceasterscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Boteler II nasceu aproximadamente 1309, em Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Boteler I, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Sybil, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 14 de agosto de 1369, em sua cidade natal, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Warrington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Boteler II родился около 1309 г. в местности варрингтон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Boteler I было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Sybil, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 14 августа 1369 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности варрингтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Boteler II nació aproximadamente 1309, en Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Boteler I, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Sybil, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Elizabeth en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 14 de agosto de 1369, en su pueblo, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Warrington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
